rationale: Educ. Code §1.001 is a general applicability provision defining which institutions the Education Code governs. It does not address property tax exemptions or school funding mechanics, so no conflict arises.
quote: This code applies to all educational institutions supported in whole or in part by state tax funds unless specifically excluded by this code.
_note: No direct conflict; §1.001 is a scope/applicability provision with no operative reference to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
